2604.04759.title: Your Agent, Their Asset: A Real-World Safety Analysis of OpenClaw
2604.04759.paper_summary: OpenClaw, the most widely deployed personal AI agent in early 2026, operates with full local system access and integrates with sensitive services such as Gmail, Stripe, and the filesystem. While these broad privileges enable high levels of automation and powerful personalization, they also expose a substantial attack surface that existing sandboxed evaluations fail to capture. To address this gap, we present the first real-world safety evaluation of OpenClaw and introduce the CIK taxonomy, which unifies an agent's persistent state into three dimensions, i.e., Capability, Identity, and Knowledge, for safety analysis. Our evaluations cover 12 attack scenarios on a live OpenClaw instance across four backbone models (Claude Sonnet 4.5, Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.4). The results show that poisoning any single CIK dimension increases the average attack success rate from 24.6% to 64-74%, with even the most robust model exhibiting more than a threefold increase over its baseline vulnerability. We further assess three CIK-aligned defense strategies alongside a file-protection mechanism; however, the strongest defense still yields a 63.8% success rate under Capability-targeted attacks, while file protection blocks 97% of malicious injections but also prevents legitimate updates. Taken together, these findings show that the vulnerabilities are inherent to the agent architecture, necessitating more systematic safeguards to secure personal AI agents. Our project page is https://ucsc-vlaa.github.io/CIK-Bench.
2604.04759.paper_summary_zh: OpenClaw，於2026年初最廣泛部署的個人AI代理，擁有完全的本地系統訪問權限，並與敏感服務如Gmail、Stripe及檔案系統整合。雖然這些廣泛的權限使得高度自動化和強大的個性化成為可能，但它們也暴露了現有沙盒評估無法捕捉的重大攻擊面。為了解決這一空白，我們提出了OpenClaw的首次現實世界安全評估，並引入了CIK分類法，將代理的持久狀態統一為三個維度，即能力、身份和知識，以進行安全分析。我們的評估涵蓋了在四個主幹模型（Claude Sonnet 4.5、Opus 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro和GPT-5.4）上對一個實時OpenClaw實例的12個攻擊場景。結果顯示，對任何單一CIK維度的污染會將平均攻擊成功率從24.6%提高到64-74%，即使是最強大的模型，其基線脆弱性也顯示出超過三倍的增長。我們進一步評估了三種與CIK對齊的防禦策略以及一種檔案保護機制；然而，最強的防禦在針對能力的攻擊下仍然產生63.8%的成功率，而檔案保護雖然阻擋了97%的惡意注入，但也阻止了合法更新。綜合來看，這些發現表明，這些脆弱性是代理架構固有的，迫切需要更系統的安全措施來保護個人AI代理。我們的項目頁面是 https://ucsc-vlaa.github.io/CIK-Bench。
2604.04759.author: Zijun Wang et.al.
2604.04759.authors: Zijun Wang, Haoqin Tu, Letian Zhang, Hardy Chen, Juncheng Wu, Xiangyan Liu, Zhenlong Yuan, Tianyu Pang, Michael Qizhe Shieh, Fengze Liu, Zeyu Zheng, Huaxiu Yao, Yuyin Zhou, Cihang Xie
